context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 modules fully tested and working. Backend uses real integrations: GPT-5.2 for comic scripts, Gemini Nano Banana for image generation, MoviePy+gTTS for video rendering. Video generation takes 15-30s, image generation takes 10-20s. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api_endpoints.py covers all endpoints with pytest. Frontend dashboard at /dashboard.html with all data-testid attributes in place.

features_verified.gemini_nano_banana_image: Working - Returns image_base64 or partial response with text
features_verified.moviepy_video_rendering: Working - Creates MP4 with handwritten animation and Indian gTTS voice
features_verified.shared_library: Working - Publish, browse, filter by type, copy content
